title: Nami Leaves with the Straw Hats
description: On pages 13–16, nami leaves with the straw hats focuses on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as the village celebrates after Arlong’s defeat while Nami prepares to leave her home behind.
scene: On pages 13–16, nami leaves with the straw hats focuses on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as the village celebrates after Arlong’s defeat while Nami prepares to leave her home behind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You sure it's okay to let her leave like this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's her goodbye so let's let her decide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: She still hasn't changed a bit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Is she going to betray us again?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Come back anytime you want, you hear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We have so much to thank you all for!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, kid! Don't forget about our promise!

summary: This part releases the tension of Arlong Park through celebration, goodbye, and Nami’s choice to sail with the crew.
